page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package for mixed-effects cosinor models. The cosinoRmixedeffects package can be implemented for the estimation and prediction of the a mixed-effects cosinor model for longitudinal periodic data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package for mixed-effects cosinor models. The cosinoRmixedeffects package can be implemented for the estimation and prediction of the a mixed-effects cosinor model for longitudinal periodic data.
